privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring dashboard ID 1 in a synthetic Emoncms environment. The dashboard must be renamed to 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor' with description 'Real-time energy and solar monitoring for Oakwood Plaza retail building', URL alias set to 'oakwood-plaza', and public access enabled (public flag = 1). These are fictional test scenario values in a containerized Docker-based Emoncms test environment. The 'Oakwood Plaza' is not a real building; it is a synthetic test case designed for agent benchmarking. All metadata values are consistent with the task requirements, verifier expectations, and Emoncms dashboard schema.
